sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ الدَّرْسُ فِي الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Čas počinje u osam sati ujutro svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: The class starts at eight in the morning every day.

sentences.arabic: يَنْتَهِي الدَّرْسُ الأَوَّلُ بَعْدَ خَمْسٍ وَأَرْبَعِينَ دَقِيقَةً.
sentences.translation: Prvi čas završava nakon četrdeset i pet minuta.
sentences.translationEn: The first class ends after forty-five minutes.

sentences.arabic: يَخْرُجُ الطُّلَّابُ لِلاِسْتِرَاحَةِ وَيَلْعَبُونَ فِي الفِنَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici izlaze na odmor i igraju se u dvorištu.
sentences.translationEn: The students go out for break and play in the yard.

sentences.arabic: يَعُودُونَ إِلَى الفَصْلِ عِنْدَمَا يَسْمَعُونَ الجَرَسَ.
sentences.translation: Vraćaju se u razred kada čuju zvono.
sentences.translationEn: They return to class when they hear the bell.
